## [09:06 - 12:07]

is to send them right into an offer because what I do is my favorite, which this should look familiar to you, it's the sideways sales letter. ## [12:07 - 12:47]

Now I do have one unexplained circle up here, and that is one of the greatest ways to build your list is to launch. And the reason is you end up getting a lot of organic word of mouth. You often, depending on the type of launch you're doing, you might get a lot of affiliate traffic, and it can even drive down the cost of your paid traffic.
